caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT OUT" and "AN" visible, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones sits in front of a microphone. He is in a studio setting with a white wall behind him featuring yellow stars and the repeated text "HUSTLE". In the background, a sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". To the left and right of the screen, logos for "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101" are displayed. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. In the first frame, he raises his right hand toward his chest. By the second frame, he leans slightly forward. In the third, he maintains a similar posture, and in the final frame, he extends his right hand outward in a gesturing motion while continuing to speak into the microphone.
